testcase.name: test_add_member_to_team

failure.message: AssertionError: User's team_id should be updated assert None == '73b4b626-a3a3-4746-abfb-903d09f2ecd9' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd8d2c9cb100>('team_id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd8d2c9cb100> = {'commission_rate_override': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-05T02:49:49.731782Z', 'department': 'Management', 'email': 'aqib@clt-academy.com', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_teams_management.py:239: in test_add_member_to_team assert updated_user.get("team_id") == team_id, "User's team_id should be updated" E AssertionError: User's team_id should be updated E assert None == '73b4b626-a3a3-4746-abfb-903d09f2ecd9' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd8d2c9cb100>('team_id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd8d2c9cb100> = {'commission_rate_override': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-05T02:49:49.731782Z', 'department': 'Management', 'email': 'aqib@clt-academy.com', ...}.get
